(Amended) Notice Of Submission On Pltf'S Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For Montary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: GORDON KNAURE, defendant in pro per and opposing party; no appearance by moving party.

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A.'s Motion to Compel Responses to Interrogatories and Request for Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED as MODIFIED. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's responses are due within 10 days. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. NOT REPORTED.
